name: spreadsheet_layout
description: Professional Excel / CSV spreadsheet structure and formatting rules

sheet_structure.name: Data
sheet_structure.purpose: Raw data table with labelled headers — first row frozen

sheet_structure.name: Summary
sheet_structure.purpose: Key statistics: count, mean, min, max, totals

sheet_structure.name: Insights
sheet_structure.purpose: Key findings as a bulleted text section

anti_patterns: mixed data types in same column
